title: CableSection
description: CableSection: Cable section to be used on Bars. Defined by cable diameter, number of cables, and total area.

Name.description: A unique Name is required for some structural packages to create and identify the object.

NumberOfCables.description: How many cables make up the cross section.

CableDiameter.description: Diameter of each cable in the section.

BreakingLoad.description: Breaking load of the cable section. For Number of cables > 1 this is assumed to be the total breaking load of all cables.

Area.description:
Gross Area of the cross section
For Number of cables > 1 this is assumed to be the total area of all cables. Property has a quantity of type Area measured in [m²].

Rgy.description: Radius of Gyration about the local Y-Axis. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Rgz.description: Radius of Gyration about the local Z-Axis. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

J.description: Torsion Constant. Property has a quantity of type TorsionConstant measured in [m⁴].

Iy.description: Moment of Inertia about the local Y-Axis. Property has a quantity of type SecondMomentOfArea measured in [m⁴].

Iz.description: Moment of Inertia about the local Z-Axis. Property has a quantity of type SecondMomentOfArea measured in [m⁴].

Iw.description: Warping Constant. Property has a quantity of type WarpingConstant measured in [m⁶].

Wely.description: Elastic Modulus of the section about the local Y-Axis. Property has a quantity of type SectionModulus measured in [m³].

Welz.description: Elastic Modulus of the section about the local Z-Axis. Property has a quantity of type SectionModulus measured in [m³].

Wply.description: Plastic Modulus of the section about the local Y-Axis. Property has a quantity of type SectionModulus measured in [m³].

Wplz.description: Plastic Modulus of the section about the local Z-Axis. Property has a quantity of type SectionModulus measured in [m³].

CentreZ.description: Geometric centre of the section in the local Z direction. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

CentreY.description: Geometric centre of the section in the local Y direction. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Vz.description: Z distance from the centroid of the section to top edge of the section. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Vpz.description: Z distance from the centroid of the section to bottom edge of the section. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Vy.description: Y distance from the centroid of the section to right edge of the section. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Vpy.description: Y distance from the centroid of the section to Left edge of the section. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Asy.description: Shear Area in the local Y direction. Property has a quantity of type Area measured in [m²].

Asz.description: Shear Area in the local Z direction. Property has a quantity of type Area measured in [m²].

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
